data.name: Tea Girls
data.detailed_description:
Tea Girls


You are the owner of a cafe owner in fantasy world. One day you encounter a trio of sexy dryad maids who come to work for you.

Features


- Visual novel with choices
- Animated and interactable sex scenes


- Lots of H-scenes
-BDSM and watersport fetishes!


- Three different endings
- Cute hand-drawn characters and backgrounds

Characters


- Sakura


Half human/ Half dryad.
She was unable to find a job for a long time. But recently found cafe Maple where she loves to make tea for the customers.
Also she uses her Dryad ability, and a bit of help from you, to enhance her tea's flavors.

- Lemola


Half human/ Half elf
Hobby: Saving money
A once-rich, but now poor aristocrat who is a little prideful.
She is always on the lookout for money in order to rise again, but doesn't have the best sense when it comes to finances.
Still, she works hard as a maid to climb her way back to riches.

- Latte


Half human/ Half cow-girl
Hobby: Yoga
She is quiet, a bit goofy and always in heat (though she might not be aware of it)
Genuinely curious about sex. Because of her peculiar
constitution, she is unable to find a job as the slightest stimulation causes her
to produce breast milk. Until one day she knocked on the door of your cafe...

data.short_description: Have fun adventures with 3 cute maids. They work for you in your cafe, providing customers special tea, and you, special services. Visual novel with different endings!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
